description: Third-arm (pi_mid) cost gate for q-0005: prices the incremental eval+training compute of the 3-policy rough/mid/fine U-shape design vs the 2-policy binary design, in e-0048 proven-affordable units, reading it against the staged-eval decision (e-0048) and the now-cleared structural gates (e-0054/e-0055/e-0057/e-0064).
motivation: Every q-0005 reopening answer (a-0052/a-0053/a-0054/a-0055) named the ~1.5x compute of a 3rd adapter+eval arm as an unpriced gate that the 2-arm Stage-0.5 cost chain (e-0048 eval / e-0052 training) never quantified. With supply/power/substantive-depth/distinct-content now cleared (e-0064), the cost is the last CPU-side gate before the only genuinely Modal-blocked one (the FORMAT extract).
formal_results: e-0048 cost model reused verbatim: cost_units = n*k*sizes*policies/50 (the e-0006/a-0005 proven-affordable run). Binary route n=106 (e-0046 >=2 frontier); pi_mid U-shape carrier set n_umid=63 (e-0057 substantive depth>=2 eval-verified). Two framings: apples-to-apples (same n, 3 vs 2 policies) and U-shape-as-run (3 policies on n_umid vs 2 policies on n_binary). Training = 1.5x adapter count. PRE-SFT lower bounds.
results_description: Apples-to-apples 3rd policy = exactly +50% eval at fixed n (k16/3sz: 204x->305x, +102x; k4/2sz: 34x->51x, +17x), confirming a-0054's 1.5x quote. But the U-shape RUNS on the smaller n_umid=63: full 3-policy U-shape = 181x vs binary 204x (ratio 0.89); lean k8/2sz 60x vs 68x; cheap k4/2sz 30x vs 34x; stage-1 single-size pass@1 3-level screen only 8x (vs binary 8.5x). Training adds n_sizes adapters (1.5x).
conclusions: The 3rd-arm cost gate is CLEARED, and the result is stronger than a-0054 feared: because the pi_mid carrier set (n_umid=63) is ~60% the binary route's n, answering the 3-level U-shape costs ~0.89x the binary headline eval (compute-NEUTRAL), NOT +50% -- the smaller carrier set offsets the extra arm. The 3rd arm's cost also lands in STAGE 2 (gated behind a cheap ~8x 2-arm single-size signal, e-0048), not paid up front. q-0005's 3-level U-shape is now cleared on supply (a-0052), eval power (a-0053), substantive depth (a-0055), distinct on-disk content (a-0062), AND cost (this gate). The SOLE remaining open gate is the off-disk term-vs-tactic FORMAT confound (e-0036/e-0037), genuinely Modal-blocked (e-0036: 0/633 residual bodies on disk) -- so binary-vs-3-level is decidable the moment the paid extract runs, every CPU-side prerequisite met. Caveat: PRE-SFT lower bounds; training wall relative only; GO here = affordable AND on-disk-warranted, still conditional on the format extract.
